name: SMALL LEFT COLON SYNDROME

demographics.Associated with: maternal diabetes mellitus (most common), maternal substance abuse; NOT

dominant_finding: colonic caliber becomes abruptly diminutive distal to splenic flexure
distribution: colonic caliber becomes abruptly diminutive distal to splenic flexure
discriminating_features: colonic caliber becomes abruptly diminutive distal to splenic flexure
bowel dilatation proximal to splenic flexure
± meconium plug (as a result and NOT the cause of obstruction)

general: colonic caliber becomes abruptly diminutive distal to splenic flexure
bowel dilatation proximal to splenic flexure
± meconium plug (as a result and NOT the cause of obstruction)

clinical.Prognosis: gradual resolution of functional immaturity over days to weeks
